subcodes.title: Words incribed in a church book for Rev. Fraser
subcodes.first_line: O Thou Kind Almighty, confirm Thou this servant of Thine, Mr. Fraser, in the service of Thy Kingdom. Make him illumined; make him heavenly; make him spiritual; make him divine! Thou art the Generous, the King!
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual transformation
